title: ICDCS
description: IEEE International Conference on Distributed Computing Systems

2017.note: Spike: 323 vs max 110. Investigated 2026-03-12: not workshop contamination. Starting 2017, DBLP indexes multiple ICDCS tracks (Industry, Applications, Vision, Short Papers, Demos, Posters) alongside main research track (~80-110 papers). Structural change in DBLP indexing.
